name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-6
title: tdd-step.py auto_close_backlog references deleted backlog-item-status.py
description: tdd-step.py auto_close_backlog() (lines 113-164) constructs a path to .claude/features/rabbit-backlog/scripts/backlog-item-status.py. That script no longer exists — it was unified into .claude/features/rabbit-file/scripts/item-status.py. The os.path.isfile check at line 130 always returns False, so auto_close_backlog is effectively dead code. Spec invariant 4 still describes this auto-close behaviour as if it works. Either restore the auto-close against item-status.py, or remove the dead code + spec invariant 4.

history.note: Wave 4: auto_close uses item-status.py; state machine accepts test-green → spec-update for cycle restart.
